Workflow

fp <- here("scripts/ancestral-areas-DEC/nuclear/")

fs::dir_tree(path = fp)
C:/Users/frwo0304/Documents/GitHub/RevBayes-DEC-Uapaca/scripts/ancestral-areas-DEC/nuclear
├── 00_DECJF_nuc-master-file.Rev
├── 00_DECJ_nuc-master-file.Rev
├── 00_DEC_nuc-master-file.Rev
├── 01_DEC-DECJ-DECJF_nuc-rate_parameter.Rev
├── 02_DECJF_nuc-cladogenetic_rate.Rev
├── 02_DECJ_nuc-cladogenetic_rate.Rev
├── 02_DEC_nuc-cladogenetic_rate.Rev
├── 03_DECJF_nuc-marginal_likelihood_analysis.Rev
├── 03_DECJ_nuc-marginal_likelihood_analysis.Rev
├── 03_DEC_nuc-marginal_likelihood_analysis.Rev
├── 04_DEC-DECJ-DECJF_compute_BF.Rev
├── 05_DEC_nuc-MCMC_best_model.Rev
├── 06_DEC_nuc-Summarize_tree.Rev
└── 07_DEC_nuc-plots.R

In RevBayes run the following scripts:

# in RevBayes run scripts:

source(fp+"00_DEC_nuc-master-file.Rev") # m0
source(fp+"00_DECJ_nuc-master-file.Rev") # m1
source(fp+"00_DECJF_nuc-master-file.Rev") # m2

# then make a pairwise comparison of bayes factors (BF) between the three models 
source(fp+"04_DEC-DECJ-DECJF_compute_BF.Rev")

# run MCMC for the best model (simple DEC in this case)
source(fp+"05_DEC_nuc-MCMC_best_model.Rev")

# Estimate ancestral areas and summarize posterior probabilities of nodes
source(fp+"06_DEC_nuc-Summarize_tree.Rev")

Next,

run the script for plotting the results.

source(here(fp, "07_DEC_nuc-plots.R"))

It includes the following: 1. plot the tracer files from the MCMC in R

  1. plot the posterior probabilities of ancestral area reconstructions on the tree

  1. plot the posterior probabilities of the stochastic character mappings on the tree
# echo: false
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig.width: 7

#### PART 5: Plotting posterior probabilities to stochastic map
posterior_file <- paste0(fp, "simple_marginal_posterior.tree")
sim_p <- read.simmap(file = posterior_file, format = "phylip")


colors <- vector()
for (i in 1:length(sim_p$maps)) {
  colors <- c(colors, names(sim_p$maps[[i]]))
}
colors <- sort(as.numeric(unique(colors)))
cols <- setNames(heat.colors(length(colors), rev = TRUE), colors)


plot_stochastic_posterior <- function() {
  par(mar = c(5, 4, 4, 26), xpd = TRUE)

  tree_depth <- max(nodeHeights(sim_p))

  plotSimmap(
    sim_p,
    cols,
    fsize = 1.25,
    lwd = 2.5,
    split.vertical = TRUE,
    ftype = "bi",
    pts = FALSE,
    xlim = c(0, tree_depth * 1.90)
  )

  leg <- names(cols)

  add.simmap.legend(
    leg,
    colors = cols,
    prompt = FALSE,
    x = tree_depth * 1.42,
    y = Ntip(sim_p) * 1.02,
    fsize = 0.65
  )
}

# Show on screen
plot_stochastic_posterior()
